data.title: Viridian Metals Secures $225K Grant to Boost Exploration in Labrador
data.description:
Viridian Metals Inc ( (TSE:VRDN) ) has issued an announcement.

Viridian Metals Inc. has received a $225,000 grant from the Junior Exploration Assistance program to support its 2024 fieldwork at the Kraken Project in Labrador. This funding, which follows a similar grant in 2023, is part of the company’s strategy to advance early-stage discoveries and is expected to drive exploration in underexplored areas, supporting regional economic development and creating opportunities for local communities. The grant highlights Labrador’s attractiveness as an exploration jurisdiction and positions Viridian to unlock the region’s critical metals potential.

More about Viridian Metals Inc

Viridian Metals Inc. is a leader in generative metal exploration with a focus on environmental responsibility and ethical practices. The company is committed to contributing to the green transition by creating sustainable value for stakeholders through responsible exploration.

YTD Price Performance: 98.00%

Average Trading Volume: 20,965

data.title: New Pacific Metals Announces Executive Leadership Changes
data.description:
An announcement from New Pacific Metals ( (TSE:NUAG) ) is now available.

On March 31, 2025, New Pacific Metals announced significant executive changes, with Andrew Williams stepping down as CEO and Director effective April 15. Jalen Yuan, the current CFO, will serve as interim CEO, while Chester Xie will take over as interim CFO. The company emphasized continuity and strategic focus during this transition, with a comprehensive search underway for a permanent CEO. These changes are crucial as New Pacific Metals continues to focus on maximizing value from its assets in Bolivia, particularly its Silver Sand project.

More about New Pacific Metals

New Pacific Metals is a Canadian exploration and development company focused on precious metal projects in Bolivia. The company is advancing three key projects: the flagship Silver Sand project, which has the potential to become one of the world’s largest silver mines, the high-margin silver-lead-zinc Carangas project, and the Silverstrike project, where a discovery drill program was completed in 2022.

YTD Price Performance: -13.10%

Average Trading Volume: 261,068

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: $186.5M

data.title: Insight Enterprises Announces Board Member Retirement
data.description:
Insight Enterprises ( (NSIT) ) has issued an update.

On March 28, 2025, Alexander Baum announced his retirement from the Board of Directors of Insight Enterprises, effective at the 2025 Annual Meeting. His departure will result in a reduction of the Board size to 10 directors. The company has also entered into a letter agreement with ValueAct Capital Management to continue sharing confidential information for strategic consultations, indicating ongoing collaboration and strategic alignment.

More about Insight Enterprises

Insight Enterprises is a leading solutions integrator, focusing on transforming businesses through innovative technology solutions.

data.title: Freegold Ventures Secures $42 Million in Private Placement Financing
data.description:
Freegold Ventures ( (TSE:FVL) ) just unveiled an update.

Freegold Ventures Limited announced the closing of a $42 million brokered private placement financing, with Paradigm Capital acting as the sole agent. The proceeds will be used primarily for advancing the Golden Summit project, with drilling expected to resume next month and an updated Mineral Resource Estimate anticipated later in the second quarter. Eric Sprott, through an entity he controls, purchased 30% of the units issued, marking a significant related party transaction. The offering is subject to final approval by the Toronto Stock Exchange, and all securities issued will have a hold period of four months and one day.

More about Freegold Ventures

Freegold Ventures Limited is a TSX-listed company focused on exploration in Alaska, holding the Golden Summit Gold Project near Fairbanks and the Shorty Creek Copper-Gold Project near Livengood through leases.

YTD Price Performance: 1.20%

Average Trading Volume: 290,917

data.title: Louisiana-Pacific Appoints Jason Ringblom as President
data.description:
Louisiana-Pacific ( (LPX) ) has issued an update.

On April 2, 2025, Louisiana-Pacific Corporation announced the appointment of Jason Ringblom as President, effective April 7, 2025, to oversee all manufacturing and commercial operations. This move is part of LP’s strategic shift to streamline operations and enhance customer experience, positioning the company for growth. The reorganization includes the elimination of certain positions and the appointment of new leadership roles, aiming to integrate operations and optimize resource allocation for improved efficiency and customer engagement.

More about Louisiana-Pacific

Louisiana-Pacific Corporation (LP Building Solutions) is a leader in high-performance building solutions, specializing in engineered wood products for builders, remodelers, and homeowners globally. Their product portfolio includes Siding Solutions, Structural Solutions, and oriented strand board (OSB), with a focus on innovation, customer service, and durable construction. Founded in 1972 and headquartered in Nashville, Tennessee, LP operates 22 manufacturing facilities across the U.S., Canada, Chile, and Brazil.

data.title: Nova Pacific Metals Expands Lara Project and Advances Drilling Plans
data.description:
Nova Lithium Corp. ( (TSE:NVPC) ) has provided an update.

Nova Pacific Metals Corp. has expanded its Lara Project by staking two additional claims, increasing the project’s strike length to 17 kilometers. This expansion, following an analysis of historical exploration results, highlights the potential of the northwest part of the property, which has been less explored compared to the southeast. The company has also applied for a drill permit for up to 10,000 meters, funded by a recent financing, to establish an updated Mineral Resource Estimate by mid-summer. Nova Pacific is committed to fostering relationships with local Indigenous communities, operating on their traditional territories.

More about Nova Lithium Corp.

Nova Pacific Metals Corp. is a Canadian exploration and development company focused on the Lara VMS deposit. The company operates within the mining industry, with a primary focus on exploring and developing mineral resources in British Columbia, Canada.

YTD Price Performance: -48.53%

Average Trading Volume: 336,373

Technical Sentiment Signal: Strong Buy

Current Market Cap: C$8.03M

data.title: Endeavour Silver to Acquire Minera Kolpa for $145 Million
data.description:
Endeavour Silver ( (TSE:EDR) ) just unveiled an update.

On April 1, 2025, Endeavour Silver Corp. announced its agreement to acquire all outstanding shares of Compañia Minera Kolpa S.A. and its main asset, the Huachocolpa Uno Mine, for a total consideration of US$145 million. This transaction is expected to enhance Endeavour’s asset portfolio and strengthen its position in the mining industry. The acquisition will be funded through a mix of cash, shares, and proceeds from a new copper purchase agreement. Additionally, Endeavour plans to raise approximately US$45 million through a bought deal financing to support the transaction. The deal, subject to regulatory approvals, is anticipated to close soon, potentially impacting stakeholders by expanding Endeavour’s mining capabilities and market reach.

More about Endeavour Silver

Endeavour Silver Corp. is a company operating in the mining industry, primarily focused on the exploration, development, and production of silver and gold. The company is based in Vancouver, British Columbia, Canada, and has a market focus on precious metals.

data.title: OKEA ASA Completes Employee Share Purchase Program
data.description:
OKEA ASA ( (DE:3SX) ) has provided an update.

OKEA ASA has completed a significant share purchase program involving 492 employees, including primary insiders, with a total of 1,488,205 shares acquired at an average price of NOK 18.6688 per share. This initiative, amounting to NOK 27.8 million, underscores the company’s commitment to aligning employee interests with corporate growth and stability, potentially enhancing stakeholder confidence.

More about OKEA ASA

OKEA ASA is a prominent operator focusing on mid- and late-life assets on the Norwegian continental shelf. The company is known for its strategy of finding value in areas where others choose to divest, emphasizing growth, value creation, and capital discipline. OKEA is publicly traded on the Oslo Stock Exchange.

data.title: Xebra Brands’ Shareholder Boosts Stake Amid Landmark Cannabis Deal in Mexico
data.description:
Xebra Brands Ltd. ( (TSE:XBRA) ) just unveiled an update.

Xebra Brands Ltd. has announced that its largest shareholder, David Ross Macias Diaz, has increased his stake in the company, signaling strong confidence in its strategic direction. The company is also exploring a landmark agricultural agreement with Mr. Diaz to cultivate cannabis on his land, marking a significant milestone in Mexico’s cannabis industry by initiating the first federally compliant cannabis agricultural activity, potentially unlocking commercial opportunities across the country.

More about Xebra Brands Ltd.

Xebra Brands Ltd. is a pioneering company in the Mexican cannabis sector, uniquely authorized to import seeds, cultivate, manufacture, and sell cannabis with less than 1% THC in Mexico.

data.title: SQM Releases 2024 Consolidated Financial Statements
data.description:
Sociedad Quimica Y Minera SA ( (SQM) ) just unveiled an update.

Sociedad Química y Minera de Chile S.A. released its consolidated financial statements as of December 31, 2024. These statements provide a comprehensive overview of the company’s financial position, including income, cash flows, and changes in equity. The release of these audited financial documents is crucial for stakeholders, as it offers transparency into the company’s financial health and operational performance over the past year, potentially impacting investor confidence and market positioning.

More about Sociedad Quimica Y Minera SA

Sociedad Química y Minera de Chile S.A. (SQM) is a leading company in the chemical and mining industry, primarily focusing on the production of specialty plant nutrition, iodine and derivatives, lithium and derivatives, potassium, and industrial chemicals. The company operates globally with a strong market presence in the production and distribution of these products.
